rationale: Educ. Code §21.152 governs continuing teacher employment contracts and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.152. CONTINUING CONTRACT. A continuing contract must be in writing and must include the terms of employment prescribed by this subchapter and any other appropriate provisions consistent with this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
